content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

**1. What is the Current Market Regime?**
RISK-ON: Normal volatility at 35.3% with broad participation (Breadth 6/8 sectors positive).

**2. Which sectors are leading?**
Banking ABOVE TREND: Banking & Finance (1W: +7.05% | 1M: +3.24%). Transportation ABOVE TREND: Transportation (1W: +4.15% | 1M: +0.86%). Construction RECOVERY: Construction & REIT (1W: +3.33% | 1M: -2.31%).

**3. Which sectors are lagging?**
Energy & Chemicals BELOW TREND: Energy & Chemicals (1W: -2.35% | 1M: -13.25%). Technology & Telecom BELOW TREND: Technology & Telecom (1W: -2.53% | 1M: -12.92%).

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

**4. Top Performing Stocks?**
YKBNK (1W: +13.39% | 1M: +1.76%) ABOVE TREND, AKBNK (1W: +12.56% | 1M: +1.47%) ABOVE TREND, GARAN (1W: +8.72% | 1M: +3.35%) ABOVE TREND, ALARK (1W: +8.63% | 1M: +6.57%) ABOVE TREND, ISCTR (1W: +8.49% | 1M: +1.42%) ABOVE TREND.

**5. Worst Performing Stocks?**
KONTR (1W: -15.81% | 1M: -34.87%) BELOW TREND, PETKM (1W: -6.96% | 1M: -26.89%) BELOW TREND, HEKTS (1W: -6.04% | 1M: -15.07%) BELOW TREND, TRMET (1W: -5.59% | 1M: -15.82%) BELOW TREND, VESTL (1W: -4.23% | 1M: -15.83%) BELOW TREND.

**6. Momentum Stocks?**
YKBNK (1W: +13.39% | 1M: +1.76%) ABOVE TREND, AKBNK (1W: +12.56% | 1M: +1.47%) ABOVE TREND, KONTR (1W: -15.81% | 1M: -34.87%) BELOW TREND, GARAN (1W: +8.72% | 1M: +3.35%) ABOVE TREND, ALARK (1W: +8.63% | 1M: +6.57%) ABOVE TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

**7. Banking Sector Outlook?**
Banks are leaders; AKBNK (1W: +12.56% | 1M: +1.47%) ABOVE TREND, GARAN (1W: +8.72% | 1M: +3.35%) ABOVE TREND, ISCTR (1W: +8.49% | 1M: +1.42%) ABOVE TREND, YKBNK (1W: +13.39% | 1M: +1.76%) ABOVE TREND — momentum intact, monitor credit spread and FX flows.

**8. Industrial Sector Outlook?**
Mixed recovery in industrials: EREGL (1W: +0.51% | 1M: -1.49%) RECOVERY, FROTO (1W: +0.58% | 1M: -7.22%) RECOVERY, TOASO (1W: +0.51% | 1M: -1.83%) RECOVERY, ASELS (1W: +2.27% | 1M: -10.05%) RECOVERY, VESTL (1W: -4.23% | 1M: -15.83%) BELOW TREND.

**9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?**
Energy remains weak: TUPRS (1W: -2.91% | 1M: -6.76%) BELOW TREND, PETKM (1W: -6.96% | 1M: -26.89%) BELOW TREND, SASA (1W: +4.42% | 1M: -10.65%) RECOVERY, HEKTS (1W: -6.04% | 1M: -15.07%) BELOW TREND, GUBRF (1W: -2.89% | 1M: -18.92%) BELOW TREND.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

**10. Portfolio Recommendation?**
Risk-on stance: overweight Banking & Finance and selective Construction/Transportation, hold pockets of Tech for short-term rebounds, underweight Energy & Chemicals and deep cyclical losers.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

**11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?**
YKBNK (1W: +13.39% | 1M: +1.76%) ABOVE TREND, AKBNK (1W: +12.56% | 1M: +1.47%) ABOVE TREND, ALARK (1W: +8.63% | 1M: +6.57%) ABOVE TREND, TCELL (1W: +5.33% | 1M: -2.89%) RECOVERY, KONTR (1W: -15.81% | 1M: -34.87%) BELOW TREND.

**12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?**
Banking ABOVE TREND (momentum and flows), Construction RECOVERY (earnings/quant strength), Energy & Chemicals BELOW TREND (commodity and margin risk).

**13. Key Levels & Triggers?**
Watch XU100 reaction to global risk-on flows, FX stability and CBRT signals, and Turkish macro prints; catalysts are bank earnings, energy margins, and foreign flows into banks and transport.

## EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
RISK-ON market with normal volatility (35.3%) and broad sector participation (6/8 positive); banks are the clear leaders. Overweight banking and selective construction/transportation while avoiding deeply lagging energy and tech names; monitor FX, CBRT commentary and foreign flows as primary triggers.
